questions.questionText: What is the primary purpose of a ViewModel?
options: To store and manage UI-related data in a lifecycle-conscious way

questions.questionText: Which library is used as an abstraction layer over SQLite in Android?
How does a ViewModel survive configuration changes like screen rotation?
options: It is tied to the application context instead of the activity
The ViewModelStore retains it during the configuration change
It doesn't; you must manually save state

questions.questionText: Which annotation is used to define a table in Room?
What does DAO stand for in Room?
Which annotation is used to mark a method in a DAO as a query?
Why should you avoid passing Activity or View references to a ViewModel?
options: It leads to memory leaks because the ViewModel outlives the Activity
It makes the ViewModel too large
ViewModels can only hold primitive types

questions.questionText: Which Room annotation is used to mark a field as a primary key?
What is the role of LiveData or StateFlow when used with ViewModel?
options: To allow the UI to observe data changes automatically
To handle multi-threading in the Repository
To delete old data from the cache

questions.questionText: Which class is responsible for creating a Room database instance?
What is a 'TypeConverter' used for in Room?
options: To convert SQL to Kotlin code
To map custom objects to types Room can store (like Long or String)
To migrate from XML to JSON

questions.questionText: Which annotation marks the main entry point for the Room database?
How can you run Room queries on a background thread using Kotlin?
options: Room runs everything on the main thread by default

questions.questionText: What happens if you try to perform a Room database operation on the main thread?
options: The app crashes with an IllegalStateException
The app slows down but works
Room automatically moves it to the background

questions.questionText: Which ViewModel subclass should be used if you need access to the Application context?
What is the purpose of the Repository pattern?
options: To provide a clean API for data access to the rest of the app

questions.questionText: Which annotation is used for inserting data into a Room table?
What is a 'Migration' in Room?
options: Moving data to a different server
Preserving data when changing the database schema version
Moving the app to a different device

questions.questionText: Which function is used to get a ViewModel instance in a Composable (using the compose-viewmodel library)?
In Room, what does 'onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.REPLACE' do?
options: Replaces the old data with new data if the primary keys match

questions.questionText: Which Room annotation is used to create a relationship between two entities?
What is the benefit of returning Flow<List<Entity>> from a Room DAO?
options: It provides a stream of data that updates automatically when the database changes
It allows the list to be edited in the UI directly

questions.questionText: When is a ViewModel's 'onCleared()' method called?
options: When the associated Activity or Fragment is permanently destroyed
Every time the app goes to the background
When the user clicks a button

questions.questionText: Which component in Room defines the list of entities and the version?
What is 'SavedStateHandle' used for in a ViewModel?
options: To persist state across system-initiated process death
To share data between two different apps

questions.questionText: Which annotation is used to delete a record in Room?
How do you specify the database name in Room?
What is the recommended way to expose state from a ViewModel to a Composable?
Which Room annotation is used to ignore a specific field so it isn't saved in the database?
What is the 'exportSchema' parameter in the @Database annotation used for?
options: To generate a JSON file representing the database schema for version history
To upload the database to the cloud
To share the schema with other apps
